query_normalized: code2lora: hypernetwork-generated adapters for code language models under software evolution computer science
rationale: The paper studies a parameter‑efficient fine‑tuning technique (Contrastive Prompt Tuning) for code language models, which belongs to the same alternative‑vocabulary cluster of PEFT methods (e.g., adapters/LoRA) relevant to the user’s focus on hypernetwork‑generated adapters for code models. It therefore provides a related methodological reference for the literature review.
